title: J.A.R.V.I.S. Public Data Sources Local Manifest Template
instructions: Copy this template to the recommended local path before adding real public source URLs.
Do not include broker, account, credential, token, private, or authenticated URLs.
Fetched data is raw and unverified local cache only.
private_data_warning: Do not add private account data, broker credentials, authenticated URLs, screenshots, PDFs, or personal files to this manifest.

sources.notes: Replace only in ignored local copy.
